character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A tall, nut-brown man with a sabre cut, ragged clothes, and a habit of staying at the Admiral Benbow inn. He carries a sea-chest, drinks rum, and avoids seafaring men with one leg.

character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A gentleman who asked the narrator to document the events of Treasure Island. He is associated with the inn and the treasure hunt.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who visits the inn and interacts with the innkeeper during the captain's stay.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: The narrator and innkeeper's son. He interacts with the captain and witnesses his behavior.

character_dossiers.name: my father
character_dossiers.biography: The innkeeper who hosts the captain and manages the Admiral Benbow inn. He interacts with the captain and his guests.
